user.title: Nanoleaf Panels
user.description: Select the Nanoleaf device to manage panels for.

abort.already_configured: This Nanoleaf device is already configured.

data.expose_panels: Expose individual panels as light entities

data_description.expose_panels: Creates a separate light entity for each physical panel, allowing direct color control from the Home Assistant UI and automations.
data_description.nanoleaf_entity: The Nanoleaf light entity whose panels to expose. Requires the Nanoleaf integration to be set up.
